_publications._publicationTitle: PRC2-Inactivating Mutations in Cancer Enhance Cytotoxic Response to DNMT1-Targeted Therapy via Enhanced Viral Mimicry.

_contextSnippet: we observed that PRC2 inactivation by CRISPR/Cas9-mediated knockout of SUZ12 enhanced sensitivity to both DNMTis
details: Enhanced sensitivity to both DAC and GSK862 when PRC2 was inactivated by CRISPR/Cas9-mediated knockout of SUZ12
